name: recall_clamav_freshclam_maps_si3
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. Real eMASS BoE file under 11.SI/ (CTP-013_clam_av): a script(1) capture of `systemctl status clamav-freshclam` and `clamscan --version`. Anti-malware definition currency + on-access scanning is SI-3 (Malicious Code Protection). Body has NO control ID / CCI / doc number; clamav daemon/signature vocabulary ('freshclam', 'ClamAV', 'main.cvd') has near-zero overlap with 'malicious code protection'. Current tagger → zero tags. Distractor SI-7 (integrity) is present as a precision guard — clamav is malware scanning, not file integrity baselining.

objectives.text: The organization employs malicious code protection mechanisms at information system entry and exit points to detect and eradicate malicious code.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Deploy anti-malware with current signatures and on-access scanning.
objectives.assessment_procedures: Examine the anti-malware configuration and signature currency.

objectives.text: The organization employs integrity verification tools to detect unauthorized changes to software, firmware, and information.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Deploy a file integrity monitoring tool.

evidence.title: CTP-013 ClamAV status capture
evidence.text:
Script started on 2026-03-06 08:30:00-0500
[root@app01 ~]# systemctl status clamav-freshclam --no-pager
  clamav-freshclam.service - ClamAV virus database updater
     Loaded: loaded (/usr/lib/systemd/system/clamav-freshclam.service; enabled)
     Active: active (running) since Thu 2026-03-05 02:00:01 EST
[root@app01 ~]# freshclam --version
ClamAV 1.0.5/27412/Thu Mar  5 04:11:22 2026
[root@app01 ~]# ls -l /var/lib/clamav/
-rw-r--r-- 1 clamav clamav 175472640 Mar  5 04:11 daily.cld
-rw-r--r-- 1 clamav clamav 167772160 Feb 28 03:02 main.cvd
[root@app01 ~]# clamdscan --version
ClamAV 1.0.5
[root@app01 ~]# grep OnAccess /etc/clamav/clamd.conf
OnAccessIncludePath /home
OnAccessPrevention yes
[root@app01 ~]# exit
Script done on 2026-03-06 08:31:14-0500
